meta.title: Fix Decimal Input Bug in CurrencyInput

task.title: Guard useEffect from overwriting user input
task.description: Add an `isInternalChange` ref that is set to true inside `handleChange` before calling `onValueChange`. In the useEffect that syncs `value` → `displayValue`, check the ref: if true, reset it and return early. Otherwise, sync from the external value as before.

task.title: Verify existing behaviors are preserved
task.description: Confirm that external updates still work: - Form reset clears the input - Initial load populates the value - Programmatic value changes (e.g. EditAccountDrawer loading account balance) reflect in the input
